name: Day Trip: Essaouira (Mogador) from Marrakech

seo.title: Essaouira Day Trip from Marrakech — Mogador, Medina, Port | Authentic Morocco Tours
seo.description: Private day trip from Marrakech to Essaouira (former Mogador): UNESCO medina, fishing port, argan trees, ramparts. Round trip in a private vehicle.

hero.tagline: Essaouira — the city of trade winds, from Marrakech

intro: Essaouira, the former Mogador, is a coastal town of unique charm: a UNESCO-listed medina, 18th-century ramparts, a lively fishing port, whitewashed alleyways and craft shops. Just 2.5 hours from Marrakech, it's the ideal day trip for a change of scenery between the Atlantic and Berber culture.
